mapper.select:
SELECT a.id, a.title, a.slug, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.category_id, ac.name AS category_name, a.view_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.word_count, a.reading_time, a.status, a.is_top, a.publish_time, a.create_time, a.update_time FROM articles a LEFT JOIN article_categories ac ON a.category_id = ac.id WHERE a.status = 2
AND MATCH(a.title, a.summary, a.content_markdown) AGAINST(#{keyword} IN BOOLEAN MODE)
ORDER BY a.is_top DESC, a.create_time DESC

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.slug, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.category_id, ac.name AS category_name, a.view_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.word_count, a.reading_time, a.is_top, a.publish_time FROM articles a LEFT JOIN article_categories ac ON a.category_id = ac.id WHERE a.status = 2 ORDER BY a.is_top DESC, COALESCE(a.publish_time, a.create_time) DESC

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.slug, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.content_html, a.content_markdown, a.category_id, ac.name AS category_name, a.view_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.word_count, a.reading_time, a.publish_time, a.update_time FROM articles a LEFT JOIN article_categories ac ON a.category_id = ac.id WHERE a.slug = #{slug} AND a.status = 2

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.slug, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.category_id, ac.name AS category_name, a.view_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.word_count, a.reading_time, a.is_top, a.publish_time FROM articles a LEFT JOIN article_categories ac ON a.category_id = ac.id WHERE a.status = 2 AND a.publish_time > (SELECT publish_time FROM articles WHERE id = #{id}) ORDER BY a.publish_time ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.slug, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.category_id, ac.name AS category_name, a.view_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.word_count, a.reading_time, a.is_top, a.publish_time FROM articles a LEFT JOIN article_categories ac ON a.category_id = ac.id WHERE a.status = 2 AND a.publish_time < (SELECT publish_time FROM articles WHERE id = #{id}) ORDER BY a.publish_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.slug, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.category_id, ac.name AS category_name, a.view_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.word_count, a.reading_time, a.is_top, a.publish_time FROM articles a LEFT JOIN article_categories ac ON a.category_id = ac.id WHERE a.status = 2 AND a.id != #{articleId} AND a.category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY a.is_top DESC, COALESCE(a.publish_time, a.create_time) DESC LIMIT 6
SELECT id, title, slug, publish_day, COALESCE(publish_time, create_time) AS publishTime FROM articles WHERE status = 2 ORDER BY COALESCE(publish_time, create_time) DESC

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.slug, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.category_id, ac.name AS category_name, a.view_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.word_count, a.reading_time, a.is_top, a.publish_time FROM articles a LEFT JOIN article_categories ac ON a.category_id = ac.id WHERE a.status = 2 AND (a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.content_markdown LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY a.is_top DESC, COALESCE(a.publish_time, a.create_time) DESC

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.slug, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.category_id, ac.name AS category_name, a.view_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.word_count, a.reading_time, a.is_top, a.publish_time FROM articles a LEFT JOIN article_categories ac ON a.category_id = ac.id WHERE a.status = 2 AND a.category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY a.is_top DESC, COALESCE(a.publish_time, a.create_time) DESC

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.slug, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.category_id, ac.name AS category_name, a.view_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.word_count, a.reading_time, a.is_top, a.publish_time FROM articles a LEFT JOIN article_categories ac ON a.category_id = ac.id INNER JOIN article_tag_relations atr ON a.id = atr.article_id WHERE a.status = 2 AND atr.tag_id = #{tagId} ORDER BY a.is_top DESC, COALESCE(a.publish_time, a.create_time) DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE articles SET view_count = view_count + #{increment} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE articles SET like_count = like_count + #{increment} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT title, view_count AS viewCount FROM articles WHERE status = 2 ORDER BY view_count DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.slug, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.category_id, ac.name AS category_name, a.view_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.word_count, a.reading_time, a.is_top, a.publish_time, a.like_count AS hot_value FROM articles a LEFT JOIN article_categories ac ON a.category_id = ac.id WHERE a.status = 2 AND COALESCE(a.publish_time, a.create_time) >= #{begin} AND COALESCE(a.publish_time, a.create_time) < #{end} ORDER BY a.like_count DESC, COALESCE(a.publish_time, a.create_time) DESC, a.id DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.slug, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.category_id, ac.name AS category_name, a.view_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.word_count, a.reading_time, a.is_top, a.publish_time, a.view_count AS hot_value FROM articles a LEFT JOIN article_categories ac ON a.category_id = ac.id WHERE a.status = 2 AND COALESCE(a.publish_time, a.create_time) >= #{begin} AND COALESCE(a.publish_time, a.create_time) < #{end} ORDER BY a.view_count DESC, COALESCE(a.publish_time, a.create_time) DESC, a.id DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.slug, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.category_id, ac.name AS category_name, a.view_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.word_count, a.reading_time, a.is_top, a.publish_time, a.like_count AS hot_value FROM articles a LEFT JOIN article_categories ac ON a.category_id = ac.id WHERE a.status = 2 ORDER BY a.like_count DESC, a.publish_time DESC, a.id DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.slug, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.category_id, ac.name AS category_name, a.view_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.word_count, a.reading_time, a.is_top, a.publish_time, a.view_count AS hot_value FROM articles a LEFT JOIN article_categories ac ON a.category_id = ac.id WHERE a.status = 2 ORDER BY a.view_count DESC, a.publish_time DESC, a.id DESC LIMIT 5
